text:
Anmol is changing the game. 😎

Working with a variety of customers across India has kept his work exciting. It's also meant that Anmol is helping power transformation across the country. Get to know what that means for him.

Quantum computing is entering its next phase.

On #QuantumDay, the shift is clear. It’s not about just one machine. It’s about connection. See how Cisco SVP and GM of Outshift Vijoy Pandey, breaks it down.

Happy #NationalPetDay 🐾
Whether they’re curled up beside you or making a guest appearance on your next call, pets make work (and life) better.

20 seconds. Big questions. Real answers. ⏱️

From responsible AI to Zero Trust to faster incident response, one thing is clear: security is evolving fast and stakes are higher than ever.

Watch as our Cisco security experts break it down. 👆

What drives AI behind the scenes?

Not just GPUs. It’s how everything connects. Networking, optics, switching, all moving data fast and reliably. Cisco SVP of Data Center, Internet & Cloud Infrastructure, Will Eatherton breaks it down from the Cisco booth 👆

AI, but make it rapid fire 🔥🎤
From edge inferencing to agentic AI, the basics still win: clear goals, built-in security, prototype before scale.

Cisco SVP & GM Kevin Wollenweber and SVP Will Eatherton in under a minute 👆

#RSAC 2026 was a whirlwind, but one theme stood out: Agentic AI. 🤖

The pace of change is wild, but Cisco President Jeetu Patel put it perfectly: the difference between leading the market and falling behind is trust.

We’re not just watching the agentic future happen; we’re securing it. From DefenseClaw, Zero Trust Access, and our new Agentic SOC with @Splunk, we’re building the guardrails to turn AI agents into our best allies—not our biggest risks.

The goal? Empowering teams, not replacing them.

What’s missing from today's multi-agent systems?

We asked SVP & GM of Outshift, Vijoy Pandey one question: Can you explain the Internet of Cognition in 60 seconds?

Inside Cisco at #NVIDIAGTC.

Innovation moves faster when you can see it up close. See how we’re bringing #AI infrastructure, #security, and #networking to life through real demos and real conversations.

AI agents already exist. The real value comes when they work together.

Learn how the #Internet of #Agents enables secure collaboration between #AI systems in this walk-and-talk with Cisco SVP & GM of Outshift Vijoy Pandey. #NVIDIAGTC #GTC26

Meet these women behind the technology—highlighting the Cisco engineers, innovators, and problem-solvers shaping the future of tech.

- Meet Akhila, who manages the CCIE Automation exam.
- Meet Lidiya, who empowers educators and students with the latest technology.
- Meet Alex, who helps secure customer infrastructure with solutions for identity, network access, and beyond.

#WomensHistoryMonth #InternationalWomensDay

Red flag or green flag? 🚩🟢
We asked security pros to weigh in 👀
Do you agree with their answers? 👆
